# Statistical Analysis of Repeated-Measures Data

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Traditional methods

_To be added._

## Mixed-effects models

_To be added._

## Generalized estimating equations

_To be added._

## Latent class models

_To be added._
